name: Speaker Audio Media Player
description: The `speaker` media player platform allows you to play on-device and online audio media via [speaker components](https://esphome.io/components/speaker/).

config_entries.label: Name
config_entries.description: The name of the media player. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Icon
config_entries.description: Manually set the icon to use for the media player in the frontend.

config_entries.label: Announcement Pipeline
config_entries.description: Configuration settings for the announcement pipeline.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for code generation. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Buffer Size
config_entries.description: The buffer size in bytes for each pipeline. Must be between `4000` and `4000000`. Defaults to `1000000`.

config_entries.label: Disabled By Default
config_entries.description: If true, then this entity should not be added to any client's frontend, (usually Home Assistant) without the user manually enabling it (via the Home Assistant UI). Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Entity Category
config_entries.description: The category of the entity. See [https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/#generic-properties](https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/#generic-properties) for a list of available options. Set to `""` to remove the default entity category.

config_entries.label: Files
config_entries.description: A list of media files to build into the firmware for on-device playback.

config_entries.label: File
config_entries.description: Path to audio file. Can be a local file path or a URL.

config_entries.label: Internal
config_entries.description: Mark this component as internal. Internal components will not be exposed to the frontend (like Home Assistant). Only specifying an `id` without a `name` will implicitly set this to true.

config_entries.label: Media Pipeline
config_entries.description: Configuration settings for the media pipeline. Same options as the `announcement_pipeline`.

config_entries.label: Task Stack In PSRAM
config_entries.description: Run the audio tasks in external memory. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Volume Increment
config_entries.description: Increment amount that the `media_player.volume_up` and `media_player.volume_down` actions will increase or decrease volume by. Defaults to `5%`.

config_entries.label: Volume Initial
config_entries.description: The default volume that mediaplayer uses for first boot where a volume has not been previously saved. Defaults to `50%`.

config_entries.label: Volume Max
config_entries.description: The maximum volume allowed. Defaults to `100%`.

config_entries.label: Volume Min
config_entries.description: The minimum volume allowed. Defaults to `0%`.
